products.name: Artisan Co. Signature Craft
products.description: Beautiful handcrafted goods made by local creators.
products.craftsmanship: Traditional Indian artisan pottery with intricate hand-painted floral motifs and vibrant glazes, showcasing meticulous brushwork and a rich cultural aesthetic.

products.name: Heirloom Knitweave Charm
products.description: Each Heirloom Knitweave Charm from Artisan Co. is a meticulous creation, handcrafted with expert knitting and crocheting techniques, adorned with layered textile embellishments and intricate detail work. Discover the delightful sensory experience of soft yarns, textured ribbons, and smooth button accents, designed to bring a unique touch of warmth and elegance to your home.
products.craftsmanship: Hand-knitting and crocheting for the main body and colorful bands, layered textile embellishment, button attachment, intricate detail work.

products.name: Heirloom Floral Jars
products.description: Each Heirloom Floral Jar is a testament to traditional artistry, featuring intricate hand-painted floral motifs meticulously crafted onto smooth ceramic. Sealed with a glossy glaze and topped with a polished wood lid, these exquisite storage jars blend beautiful form with lasting function, perfect for preserving your treasures.
products.craftsmanship: Traditional hand-painted pottery with intricate floral motifs, showcasing detailed artisanal skill
products.imagenPromptDescription: Two ornate, hand-painted ceramic storage jars with polished wooden lids, set on a warm, reflective wooden surface. Each jar is cylindrical with a slightly bulbous base and features a vibrant, glossy red glaze as the background. Intricate, stylized floral patterns in white, light blue, yellow, and green adorn the entire body of the jars, depicting large blossoms and winding leafy vines. A distinct turquoise blue band encircles the rim and base of each jar. The smooth, medium-brown wooden lids are topped with small, spherical ceramic knobs that are also hand-painted with miniature floral details. The jars reflect the ambient light, showcasing their glazed finish. In a shallow depth of field, a blurred background of green foliage is visible.

products.name: Handcrafted Handcrafted Pottery
products.description: A beautiful piece made of clay, earth minerals. Featuring a grainy and tactile finish.
products.tagline: Finely shaped by hand. Crafted for you.
products.imagenPromptDescription: A handcrafted ceramic vessel with organic textures and natural earth tones.
